patterns.name: Redundant SSTORE
patterns.description: Writing same value to storage wastes gas
patterns.detection: Bytecode: SSTORE with same value already at slot

patterns.name: Repeated SLOAD
patterns.description: Same storage slot read multiple times without caching
patterns.detection: Bytecode: Multiple SLOAD to same slot within 10 opcodes
patterns.recommendation: Cache storage value in memory variable

patterns.name: Storage Access in Loop
patterns.detection: Bytecode: SLOAD/SSTORE between JUMPDEST and JUMP sequence
patterns.recommendation: Move storage access outside loop or use memory

patterns.name: Unpacked Storage Variables
patterns.description: Multiple small variables occupy separate slots instead of being packed

patterns.name: String Concatenation
patterns.description: String concatenation with + operator creates new string each time
patterns.detection: Source: string.concat or abi.encodePacked in loop

patterns.name: External Call Overhead
patterns.description: Multiple external calls to same contract can be batched
patterns.detection: Bytecode: Multiple CALL with same target address

patterns.name: Long Error Strings
patterns.description: require() with long error strings wastes deployment gas
patterns.recommendation: Use custom errors (Solidity 0.8.4+) instead of strings

patterns.name: Transient Storage Opportunity
patterns.description: Reentrancy locks could use TSTORE/TLOAD (EIP-1153) for gas savings
patterns.detection: Source: ReentrancyGuard pattern with SSTORE/SLOAD for lock
patterns.recommendation: Use TSTORE/TLOAD for temporary lock values
